title: Jumellea penicillata
taxonomy: Jumellea penicillata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Jumellea, which is a group of epiphytic orchids native to the tropical regions of the Old World. The genus Jumellea is further divided into several species, each with distinct characteristics and habitats. Jumellea penicillata is one of the species within this genus, known for its unique features and adaptations to its environment. The classification of Jumellea penicillata helps scientists understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other orchid species.
